global.description: The ad features a full canvas background with a prominent VantaStyle logo positioned in the top left. The main subject is highlighted by a bold headline stating 'Up to 40%' centered in the middle of the ad, followed by body text 'off Only this weekend' directly below. A call-to-action button labeled 'Order now' is located at the bottom center. A 'SALE' badge is placed in the top right corner, enhancing the promotional aspect. The overall layout is complemented by segmented decorative elements on the sides and center, creating a dynamic visual appeal.
global.visual_style: Modern flat design with vibrant colors
global.main_message: Limited time offer with significant discounts

embedding_texts.global_text: Mobile ad for VantaStyle Drops promoting a weekend sale with a strong call to action.
